zh.Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其
zh.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey於1332年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其。他與Mrs. Margaret Bailey在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年在他的家鄉享年24歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey于1332年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其。他与Mrs. Margaret Bailey在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年在他的家乡享年24岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Bailey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name for a steward or official, from Middle English bailli ‘manager, administrator’ (Old French baillis, from Late Latin baiulivus, an adjectival derivative of baiulus ‘attendant, carrier, porter’).
English: habitational name from Bailey in Little Mitton, Lancashire, named with Old English beg ‘berry’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

English: occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived by the outer wall of a castle, from Middle English (Old French) bailli ‘outer courtyard of a castle’ (Old French bail(le) ‘enclosure’, a derivative of bailer ‘to enclose’). This term became a placename in its own right, denoting a district beside a fortification or wall, as in the case of the Old Bailey in London, which formed part of the early medieval outer wall of the city.

variants.name: Bailly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Marcel, Philippe.
French: occupational name for a steward or official, from Old French baillif. Compare Bailey 4.
French: habitational name from (Le) Bailly, the name of several places in the northern part of France.

variants.name: Bale
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by the outer wall of a castle, Middle English bailli, baile, from Old French bail(le) ‘enclosure’ (see Bailey 3).
Breton (Balé): variant of Balay .
French: unexplained.

variants.name: Baily
meanings: English: variant of   Bailey  .

variants.name: Bayly
meanings: English: variant of   Bailey  .

variants.name: Bayley
meanings: English: variant of   Bailey  .

variants.name: Balay
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Rajesh, Satish.
Altered form of English   Bailey  .
French: habitational name from any of various minor places so named.

variants.name: Baile
meanings: Spanish: status name for a steward or official, from Old Spanish baile, Late Latin baiulivus; cognate with English Bailey .
French (southern): variant of   Bail  .
English: variant of   Bale  .

variants.name: Baillie
meanings: Scottish:

from Older Scots baillie, baili. In Scotland, a baillie was a status name for any of various officials, including the chief magistrate in a barony and (later) the chief magistrate or administrative officer of a barony or district. Etymologically, this is the same word as English Bailey , but the functions as well as the spelling of the two officials were different in England and Scotland.
topographic name from Older Scots bailli ‘outer court of a castle’; see Bailey 3 and Bale 1.

variants.name: Baley
meanings: English: variant of   Bailey  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey was born in 1332, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs. Margaret Bailey in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1356, in his hometown, at the age of 24, and was buried in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey est né en 1332, à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Mrs. Margaret Bailey à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1356, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey wurde 1332 in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat in Shropshire, England Mrs. Margaret Bailey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1356 im Alter von 24 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey è nato il nel 1332 nel Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Mrs. Margaret Bailey nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1356, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Walter Baileyは1332年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた。イギリスシュロプシュアイアでMrs. Margaret Baileyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年に故郷で24歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアカンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey(은)는 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 태어났다. 그는 영국 슈럽실르에서 Mrs. Margaret Bailey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 그의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey nasceu em 1332, em Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Margaret Bailey em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1356, em sua cidade natal, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey родился в 1332 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margaret Bailey в местности шропшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1356 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Walter Bailey nació en 1332, en Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Mrs. Margaret Bailey en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1356, en su pueblo, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultado en Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
